Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Assigned To Arbitration On Sep-12-16

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT-
BART's demurrer to both claims alleged in the first amended complaint is overruled as to the first cause of action for general negligence and sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to the second cause of action for premises liability. The first cause of action sufficiently alleges a cognizable claim against a public entity for the negligence of its employees (Government Code 815.2(a)) and for breach of the duty of care of a common carrier (Lopez v. Southern California Rapid Transit District (1985) 40 Cal. 3d 780). The second cause of action fails to specify the alleged dangerous condition of public property. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JASON BALOGH, TEL. NO. 1-925-428-7411, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. KRISTIN N. IVANCO OF WILSON ELSER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-433-0990 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR AS MOOT. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT HAS BEEN FILED. Judge: Richard Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter; Rose Miller, CSR #5041 =302/ru
